title: [Example] Fix missing alt text on media thumbnails
body: ## Problem Media thumbnail `` elements are rendered without `alt` attributes, failing WCAG 1.1.1. ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] Every thumbnail carries a meaningful `alt` (filename or description) - [ ] Empty decorative images use `alt=""`

title: [Example] Add keyboard shortcut to open upload panel
body:
## Goal
Power users should be able to open the upload panel without reaching for the mouse.

## Proposed shortcut
`U` while focus is on the map view.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Pressing `U` opens the upload panel
- [ ] Shortcut is listed in the keyboard shortcuts help overlay

title: [Example] Migrate legacy var(--color-*) tokens in sidebar SCSS
body:
## Context
The sidebar SCSS still uses a handful of legacy `var(--color-*)` custom properties that should be replaced with tweakcn equivalents per `docs/design/agent-css-variable-contract.md`.

## Files to update
- `apps/web/src/app/shell/sidebar/sidebar.component.scss`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No `var(--color-*)` references remain in sidebar SCSS
- [ ] `ng build` passes without warnings
